title: Python Wrappers: Expose global variables and allow logging to python streams
body:
Global variables are now accessible via the new `Yosys` class. (E.g. `libyosys.Yosys.pass_register` can now be checked to see what passes are available).

To capture Yosys output, once can now register an output stream in Pyosys. To do this, create a `io.FileIO` and register it by calling `libyosys.log_to_stream(fileio)`. Unfortunately, this cannot be done by modifying the global variable `Yosys::log_streams` because FileIO is cumbersome to wrap both from and to python.
